briefdescription.para: Donne des informations sur le type de l'Objet_U.

simplesect.para: (const Type_info*) structure regroupant les informations sur le type de l'Objet_U

briefdescription.para: this method must be overloaded if some preparation is necessary.

detaileddescription.para: It is called after a call to reinit() and before the next call to preconditionner_(). Do not forget to call the prepare_() method of the ancestor (at the end of the routine, otherwise status will be put to READY) and use get_status() to know what should be prepared.

briefdescription.para: Ecriture de l'objet sur un flot de sortie Methode a surcharger.
Lecture d'un Objet_U sur un flot d'entree Methode a surcharger.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Matrice_Morse_Sym &mat, const DoubleVect &secmem, DoubleVect &solution, const Champ_Inc_base &champ)
memberdef.name: res_syst_loc_hybride

memberdef.argsstring: (const Matrice_Morse_Sym &mat, const DoubleVect &secmem, DoubleVect &solution, const Champ_Inc_base &champ)
memberdef.name: res_syst_loc_simple
